всьо на свої лотоки.meaning: always looking out for one's own advantage, turning everything to one's own benefit

в руках.meaning: in one's hands, in one's power, under one's control or management

не рука.meaning: it won't do; it is not suitable, convenient, or acceptable

на свою руку.meaning: on one's own, independently, on one's own initiative or risk

з порожніми руками.meaning: empty-handed, with empty hands, without gifts, unrewarded

мати довгі руки.meaning: to be a thief, to be light-fingered, to have sticky fingers, to be prone to stealing

ходити з довгою рукою.meaning: to beg, to ask for alms

дати за руки.meaning: to give as a deposit, to give as collateral, to pawn

як дві краплі води.meaning: like two peas in a pod (very similar)
